base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of assembled_structure_castle — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Pre-composed castle structure — 5 tiles wide × 5 tiles tall with doorway + 2 windows + battlement crenellation top. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pre-composed castle structure — 5 tiles wide × 5 tiles tall with doorway + 2 windows + battlement crenellation top; appears at end of each world before boss or bonus
